task: Close out multi-engine validation and activate tenant governance epic
acceptance_criteria: Epic 05 close-out is explicit and Epic 06 parent truth artifacts plus child skeletons exist
notes: User explicitly approved crossing the prior single-tenant freeze, so Epic 06 is now an active roadmap item rather than a deferred placeholder

task: Freeze organization identity contract and auth session baseline
acceptance_criteria: Auth/session contracts carry explicit active-organization identity without regressing the current single-organization path
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/auth tests/api/rbac && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm typecheck
notes: Auth domain, seed users, session context, `/auth/*` responses, OpenAPI snapshot, and typed client now carry explicit active-organization identity while preserving the current default-org behavior

task: Establish organization and membership persistence baseline
acceptance_criteria: Postgres schema and bootstrap contracts persist organizations and memberships as first-class governance truth
notes: Postgres schema version is now `4`, bootstrap/verify require organizations plus organization_memberships, and existing runtime/control-plane regressions remain green

task: Scope control-plane assets and settings to organization context
acceptance_criteria: Instances and system settings read/write through explicit organization context while preserving the current default-org path
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/assets tests/integration/control_plane && pnpm openapi:check
notes: Control-plane instances/settings are now organization-scoped end-to-end across domain, repository, Postgres schema v5 migration, routes, and live-gate regression without changing current payload shapes

task: Scope alerting workflow and audit trails to organization context
acceptance_criteria: Alert queries, workflow actions, and audit evidence remain organization-consistent under the active-org model
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/alerting tests/integration/alert_pipeline tests/recovery
notes: Alerting rules/alerts/history are now organization-scoped across domain, repository, Postgres schema v6, routes, workflow actions, and PostgreSQL live-gate regression

task: Expose organization governance semantics in API and web surfaces
acceptance_criteria: OpenAPI, typed client, session-aware web shell, and minimal organization governance UI stay aligned with backend truth
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build
notes: Typed auth session data is now visible in the web shell and settings governance surface, and the web validation bundle stays green under the new organization-aware session model

acceptance_criteria: Epic 06 signoff passes from repository root with explicit organization-governance evidence and single-org guardrail proof
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && uv run pytest tests/api/auth tests/api/rbac tests/api/assets tests/api/alerting tests/integration/control_plane tests/integration/alert_pipeline tests/schema/test_schema_bootstrap.py tests/ops && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm smoke
